data.title: Jersey Mike's founder leads international expansion into UK and Ireland, plans to open 400 stores.
data.description: Peter Cancro, the founder of Jersey Mike's Subs, is set to spearhead the brand's expansion into Europe by opening 400 stores. Based in Manasquan, New Jersey, this move represents the Company's first foray into the European market. Known for its fresh and customizable fast-casual sandwiches, Jersey Mike's currently operates as a leading franchisor with a network of over 3,200 stores. The initiative towards European expansion under Cancro's leadership marks a significant milestone for the brand.

data.title: China Yuchai International acquires Equity of Nanyue Diankong (Hengyang) Industrial Technology on Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, in Singapore, China Yuchai International Limited (NYSE: CYD) announced its status as a leading powertrain solution provider through its primary subsidiary in China, Guangxi Yuchai Machinery Company Limited ("Yuchai"). China Yuchai is recognized for manufacturing powertrain solutions at a significant scale and is a key player in the industry.

data.title: First Abu Dhabi Bank and T. Rowe Price partner to enhance investment offering in GCC. FAB is one of the world's largest financial institutions.
data.description: Today, First Abu Dhabi Bank (FAB) in the UAE revealed a new strategic collaboration with T. Rowe Price, a distinguished global asset management company. FAB, known as one of the world's largest and most secure financial institutions, aims to strengthen its position further through this partnership.

data.title: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. to sell manufacturing and supply rights for SmartDose® 3.5mL to AbbVie in a definitive agreement.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. revealed a deal to sell off all manufacturing and supply rights. West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc., a key player in providing innovative solutions for injectable drug administration, is listed on the NYSE under the symbol WST. The transaction marks a significant development for the company and its stakeholders.

data.title: IFG forms President's Advisory Council in Jan. 2026 to enhance engagement and strategy, with 600 financial professionals.
data.description: A newly formed Council aims to influence strategy, boost advisor involvement, and drive common objectives. Located in San Diego and launched on Jan. 12, 2026, Independent Financial Group, LLC (IFG), a privately owned independent wealth management firm, supports over 600 financial professionals.

data.title: Lt. Gen Mary O'Brien joins Operation Homefront's National Board of Directors, a nonprofit serving military families.
data.description: In San Antonio on January 12, 2026, Operation Homefront, a prominent nonprofit organization supporting military families in the U.S., chose Lt. Gen Mary O'Brien, a retired USAF officer, as a strategic consultant in the field of national security and technology.

data.title: Kroger enhances customer experience with Google Cloud partnership and Gemini AI, offering personal shopping assistant.
data.description: Kroger Company (stock symbol: KR) revealed a boosted collaboration with Alphabet Inc. (stock symbol: GOOG) on Sunday, aiming to improve customer satisfaction. The partnership involves implementing the Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience (CX) solution. This innovative move will introduce a new personal shopping assistant merging cutting-edge technology with Kroger's food and customer service proficiency. The grocery giant plans to introduce the Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience solution throughout its operations.

data.title: Heineken Holding NV discloses purchases under its ongoing share repurchase plan.
data.description: A recent report has disclosed that the number of new COVID-19 cases in the country has risen by over 25% in the last week alone. The total number of confirmed cases now stands at more than 100,000, with a majority of them reported in urban areas. Health experts attribute this surge to the increased spread of the Delta variant of the virus, which is known to be more contagious. The rise in cases has also led to a sharp increase in hospitalizations, with the number of COVID-19 patients in critical condition exceeding 5,000. Authorities have urged the public to follow safety guidelines and get vaccinated to help curb the spread of the virus.

data.title: Uniper & AM Green ink deal for up to 500,000 tons/year renewable ammonia from India, marking crucial India-Europe supply milestone.
data.description: CEO Michael Lewis from Uniper referred to the newly established supply corridor between India and Europe as "one of the first large-scale ones." Meanwhile, Anil Kumar Chalamalasetty, Founder of AM Green, highlighted this collaboration as a significant achievement for India's participation in the global energy transition. This development, announced on Jan. 12, 2026, in Düsseldorf, Germany and Hyderabad, India, stands as a testament to the growing synergy between the two regions.

data.title: Kroger uses Gemini AI to enhance customer experience, partnering with Google Cloud. The company will implement Gemini Enterprise for CX.
data.description: Kroger Company, listed on NYSE as KR, revealed an extended collaboration with Alphabet Inc., trading as GOOG on NASDAQ, stating its plan to improve customer experiences. The partnership involves the adoption of Google Cloud's Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience (CX) solution. This move aims to introduce a novel personal shopping assistant integrating cutting-edge technology with Kroger's proficiency in the food and customer service fields. The rollout of Gemini Enterprise for CX will mark a significant enhancement in Kroger's services. Check full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Tempus AI stock surges as company reports $1.27 billion revenue in 2025, 111% growth in Diagnostics, $367 million in Q4 revenue.
data.description: Tempus AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: TEM) saw its stock increase following the release of its preliminary financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company reported total revenue of approximately $1.27 billion for 2025, marking an 83% growth year-over-year. Excluding Ambry, the organic growth was around 30%. In terms of revenue breakdown, Diagnostics brought in about $955 million, showing a substantial 111% increase compared to the previous year. This growth was primarily driven by a 26% rise in oncology test volume and a 29% increase in hereditary testing. Data and applications revenue reached around $316 million, a 31% growth fueled by a 38% surge in Insights (data licensing). For the fourth quarter, Tempus AI reported revenue of about $367 million, an 83% increase year-over-year. Diagnostics revenue amounted to approximately $266 million, up 121% from the previous year, with oncology test volume growing by 29% and hereditary testing expanding by 23%. Data and applications revenue stood at $100 million.

data.title: Cynthia Dano, a two-time cancer survivor, shares her healing journey after being uprooted by cancer.
data.description: Olympia, Washington - On January 12, 2026, Cynthia Dano opened up about her battle with cancer, a diagnosis she received in 2014. Citing her family history of breast cancer, Dano spoke candidly about the challenges she faced. Despite the initial shock, Dano's story is one of resilience and hope as she discussed the importance of reclaiming time and the power it holds in difficult circumstances. Her reflections shed light on the emotional journey individuals undergo when dealing with illness.

data.title: Champagne Specialist Course returns to Verona in Feb 2026, 2 editions in English and Italian. Hosted by Italian Wine Academy.
data.description: In Verona, Italy, the Italian Wine Academy is set to hold the Comité Champagne 'Champagne Specialist' Course in February 2026 for the second time. The course will consist of two editions in the same week, one in English and the other in Italian, with separate instructors for each. This prestigious program attracts wine enthusiasts seeking in-depth knowledge on champagne. Attendees will have the opportunity to enhance their expertise in this sector and gain valuable insights.
